content:
FINAL PRODUCTION CLOSEOUT — COMPLETE IVX END-TO-END

This is the final production closeout. Do not stop after another report. Execute, deploy, verify, and close every remaining item with evidence.

CURRENT VERIFIED STATE

PASS
- GitHub synchronized
- Backend synchronized
- Backend deployed
- Reels API returns 6 videos
- 23/23 API routes pass
- Landing page deployed
- Registration working
- Chat frontend live
- APK built
- Video and thumbnail URLs working

REMAINING ITEMS

- Android real-device QA
- Member → Admin HQ verification
- CloudFront cache invalidation
- www redirect verification
- Final production recordings
- Final acceptance evidence

==================================================
PHASE 1 — VERIFY LIVE PRODUCTION
==================================================

Verify all live environments:

1. GitHub HEAD
2. Backend SHA
3. Frontend SHA
4. Landing page build
5. Chat frontend
6. APK build

Return one table:

Component
GitHub SHA
Production SHA
Deployment ID
Timestamp
PASS/FAIL

No stale deployment is allowed.

==================================================
PHASE 2 — LANDING PAGE QA
==================================================

Audit every section of https://ivxholding.com

Verify:

✓ Hero
✓ Featured properties
✓ Reels
✓ How it works
✓ Reviews
✓ Security
✓ Partners
✓ Registration
✓ Footer
✓ Navigation
✓ Mobile menu
✓ CTA buttons

Verify:

- no jumping
- no layout shift
- no blank sections
- no horizontal scrolling
- no console errors
- no broken images
- no broken videos
- no stale assets

==================================================
PHASE 3 — REELS
==================================================

Verify:

- play
- pause
- mute
- unmute
- swipe
- replay
- share
- comment
- like
- unlike
- save
- open property
- return

Verify:

- exactly one active player
- maximum three mounted players
- no duplicate playback
- no memory leak
- no crash
- no expired media URL

==================================================
PHASE 4 — MEMBER FLOW
==================================================

Register one QA member.

Verify:

Landing Page

↓

Supabase Auth

↓

Member Profile

↓

Members Module

↓

Admin HQ

Return:

- user id
- member id
- timestamps
- evidence

Label or remove QA member afterwards.

==================================================
PHASE 5 — OWNER LOGIN
==================================================

Verify:

Owner login

Owner Dashboard

Members

Investors

CRM

Variables

Owner AI

Chat

Logout

Protected routes must reject unauthorized users.

==================================================
PHASE 6 — ANDROID
==================================================

Use the latest APK.

Verify:

- install
- launch
- login
- registration
- reels
- chat
- landing sync
- background
- foreground
- airplane mode
- Wi-Fi
- cellular
- three cold starts
- fifty reel swipes
- thirty-minute session

Capture:

- screenshots
- screen recording
- adb logcat

==================================================
PHASE 7 — CLOUDFRONT
==================================================

Complete:

- cache invalidation
- www redirect
- verify CDN

Return:

Distribution ID

Invalidation ID

Status

==================================================
PHASE 8 — FINAL QA
==================================================

Run final regression.

Verify:

Backend

Frontend

Landing

Reels

Registration

Owner login

Members

Admin HQ

Chat

Properties

Deals

Analytics

SEO

Security

Performance

Accessibility

==================================================
PHASE 9 — AUTONOMOUS EXECUTION
==================================================

Continue automatically until complete.

For every failure:

diagnose

repair

commit

deploy

verify

retry

Only stop if a real owner-only blocker exists.

If owner action is required:

Send:

IVX IA chat

Push notification

Trace ID

Exact blocker

Exact action

Resume automatically after owner action.

==================================================
PHASE 10 — FINAL EVIDENCE
==================================================

Return only one final table.

ITEM

EXPECTED

ACTUAL

PASS/FAIL

EVIDENCE

Include:

✓ GitHub SHA

✓ Backend SHA

✓ Frontend SHA

✓ Deployment IDs

✓ CloudFront invalidation

✓ www redirect

✓ APK build ID

✓ RuntimeVersion

✓ Reels verification

✓ Registration verification

✓ Member sync

✓ Admin HQ verification

✓ Owner login verification

✓ Android QA

✓ Screen recordings

✓ Screenshots

✓ Console log

✓ Network log

✓ adb log

✓ Remaining blockers

==================================================
FINAL STATUS RULE
==================================================

Do NOT report:

COMPLETE

CERTIFIED

VERIFIED

PRODUCTION READY

until ALL of these are true:

✓ Backend SHA matches GitHub

✓ Frontend SHA matches GitHub

✓ Landing page is live

✓ Reels are stable

✓ Registration reaches Admin HQ

✓ Owner login verified

✓ Android APK verified

✓ 50 reel swipes completed without crash

✓ 30-minute stability session completed

✓ CloudFront cache invalidated

✓ www redirect verified

✓ Final screenshots attached

✓ Final screen recordings attached

✓ Final deployment evidence attached

If any item is still pending, mark the release:

STATUS = PRODUCTION CLOSEOUT IN PROGRESS

Do not close the task until every remaining item is complete.
